| **Subscriptions** | Narrow REQ count when opening, subscription timeouts (warn), chat replay for spawn-on-mention | [...]      - `ensure_subscription`: added `tracing::debug!(channel, req_count, "opening narrow channel REQs")`; timeout → `tracing::warn!`
     - `replay_channel_chat`: added `tracing::debug!(channel, "replaying channel chat")`; timeout → `tracing::warn!`
